mapper.select:
SELECT b.id AS bill_id, b.bill_no, b.bill_type, b.bill_status, b.audit_date, b.suppler_id AS bill_supplier_id, b.his_push_status AS bill_his_push_status, b.his_push_msg AS bill_his_push_msg, b.his_push_time AS bill_his_push_time, b.department_id, b.warehouse_id, d.name AS department_name, d.his_id AS department_his_id, w.name AS warehouse_name, w.his_id AS warehouse_his_id, e.id AS entry_id, e.material_id, e.qty, e.unit_price, e.amt, e.batch_no, e.batch_number, e.begin_time, e.end_time, e.suppler_id AS entry_supplier_id, e.stk_inventory_id, e.dep_inventory_id, e.kc_no, e.his_push_status, e.his_push_msg, e.his_memo, e.his_spd_detail_id, e.his_pharmacy_stock_id, e.his_drug_id, e.his_drug_spec_packing_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.material_name, ''), m.name) AS material_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.material_speci, ''), m.speci) AS material_speci, m.code AS material_code, m.his_id AS material_his_id, m.his_spec_packing_id AS material_his_spec_packing_id
ORDER BY b.bill_status ASC, b.create_time DESC, b.id DESC, e.id ASC

SELECT id, bill_no, bill_type, bill_status, tenant_id, department_id, warehouse_id, suppler_id, his_push_status, his_push_msg, audit_date FROM stk_io_bill WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{billId} AND (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag != 1) LIMIT 1

SELECT e.id AS entry_id, e.material_id, e.qty, e.unit_price, e.batch_no, e.batch_number, e.begin_time, e.end_time, e.suppler_id AS entry_supplier_id, e.stk_inventory_id, e.dep_inventory_id, e.kc_no, e.his_push_status, e.his_push_msg, e.his_memo, e.his_spd_detail_id, e.his_pharmacy_stock_id, e.his_drug_id, e.his_drug_spec_packing_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.material_name, ''), m.name) AS material_name, m.his_id AS material_his_id, m.his_spec_packing_id AS material_his_spec_packing_id FROM stk_io_bill_entry e LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON e.material_id = m.id AND m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} WHERE e.paren_id = #{billId} AND e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND (e.del_flag IS NULL OR e.del_flag != 1) ORDER BY e.id ASC
SELECT id, name, his_id FROM fd_warehouse WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, his_id FROM fd_department WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, his_id FROM fd_supplier WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, his_id, his_spec_packing_id FROM fd_material WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, his_pharmacy_stock_id, his_storage_stock_id, his_stock_query_id FROM stk_dep_inventory WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE stk_io_bill_entry SET his_memo = #{hisMemo}, his_spd_detail_id = #{hisSpdDetailId}, his_drug_id = #{hisDrugId}, his_drug_spec_packing_id = #{hisDrugSpecPackingId}, his_push_status = #{hisPushStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{entryId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
UPDATE stk_io_bill_entry SET his_pharmacy_stock_id = #{hisPharmacyStockId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{entryId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

UPDATE stk_io_bill_entry SET his_pharmacy_stock_id = #{hisPharmacyStockId}, his_storage_stock_id = #{hisStorageStockId}, his_stock_query_id = #{hisStockQueryId}, his_push_status = #{hisPushStatus}, his_push_msg = #{hisPushMsg}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{entryId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
UPDATE stk_io_bill_entry SET his_push_status = #{hisPushStatus}, his_push_msg = #{hisPushMsg}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{entryId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

UPDATE stk_io_bill SET his_push_status = #{hisPushStatus}, his_push_time = NOW(), his_push_msg = #{hisPushMsg}, his_trace_id = #{hisTraceId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{billId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

UPDATE stk_dep_inventory SET his_pharmacy_stock_id = #{hisPharmacyStockId}, his_storage_stock_id = #{hisStorageStockId}, his_stock_query_id = #{hisStockQueryId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{depInventoryId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
